preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM polls WHERE question_en = 'Should India impose an identical nationwide spending cap on every Lok Sabha candidate, regardless of party?'

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should India impose an identical nationwide spending cap on every Lok Sabha candidate, regardless of party?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या भारत को हर लोकसभा उम्मीदवार पर पार्टी की परवाह किए बिना समान राष्ट्रव्यापी खर्च सीमा लागू करनी चाहिए?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should India impose an identical nationwide spending cap on every Lok Sabha candidate, regardless of party?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — same cap for all

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — सभी के लिए समान सीमा

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should India impose an identical nationwide spending cap on every Lok Sabha candidate, regardless of party?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, but higher cap for larger constituencies

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां, लेकिन बड़े निर्वाचन क्षेत्रों के लिए अधिक सीमा

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should India impose an identical nationwide spending cap on every Lok Sabha candidate, regardless of party?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — parties should set their own limits

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — पार्टियों को अपनी सीमा तय करनी चाहिए

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should India impose an identical nationwide spending cap on every Lok Sabha candidate, regardless of party?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should election spending limits be indexed to inflation and reviewed every two years, with identical rules for all parties?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या चुनावी खर्च सीमा को मुद्रास्फीति से जोड़कर हर दो साल समीक्षा की जानी चाहिए, सभी पार्टियों के लिए समान नियमों के साथ?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should election spending limits be indexed to inflation and reviewed every two years, with identical rules for all parties?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — automatic inflation-linked review

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — स्वचालित मुद्रास्फीति-आधारित समीक्षा

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should election spending limits be indexed to inflation and reviewed every two years, with identical rules for all parties?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, but Parliament should approve each revision

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां, लेकिन संसद को हर संशोधन मंज़ूर करना चाहिए

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should election spending limits be indexed to inflation and reviewed every two years, with identical rules for all parties?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — fixed limits are sufficient

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — निश्चित सीमा पर्याप्त हैं

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should election spending limits be indexed to inflation and reviewed every two years, with identical rules for all parties?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should anonymous cash donations above ₹2,000 to any candidate or party be banned, with identical penalties for all political entities?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या ₹2,000 से अधिक गुमनाम नकद दान किसी भी उम्मीदवार या पार्टी को प्रतिबंधित होना चाहिए, सभी राजनीतिक संस्थाओं के लिए समान दंड के साथ?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should anonymous cash donations above ₹2,000 to any candidate or party be banned, with identical penalties for all political entities?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — full ban on anonymous cash

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — गुमनाम नकद पर पूर्ण प्रतिबंध

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should anonymous cash donations above ₹2,000 to any candidate or party be banned, with identical penalties for all political entities?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, but only for parties — not individual candidates

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां, लेकिन केवल पार्टियों के लिए — व्यक्तिगत उम्मीदवारों के लिए नहीं

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should anonymous cash donations above ₹2,000 to any candidate or party be banned, with identical penalties for all political entities?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — current disclosure rules are enough

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — वर्तमान प्रकटीकरण नियम पर्याप्त हैं

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should anonymous cash donations above ₹2,000 to any candidate or party be banned, with identical penalties for all political entities?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should election ballots show only candidate names and photos, with no party symbols or names?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या चुनावी मतपत्र पर केवल उम्मीदवार का नाम और फोटो होना चाहिए, बिना पार्टी चिह्न या नाम के?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should election ballots show only candidate names and photos, with no party symbols or names?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — individual candidate only on ballot

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — मतपत्र पर केवल व्यक्तिगत उम्मीदवार

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should election ballots show only candidate names and photos, with no party symbols or names?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, but party name in small print is acceptable

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां, लेकिन छोटे अक्षरों में पार्टी का नाम स्वीकार्य है

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should election ballots show only candidate names and photos, with no party symbols or names?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — party symbols help voters decide

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — पार्टी चिह्न मतदाताओं को निर्णय लेने में मदद करते हैं

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should election ballots show only candidate names and photos, with no party symbols or names?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should local body elections (municipal and panchayat) be fully non-partisan, with no party affiliation allowed on the ballot?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या स्थानीय निकाय चुनाव (नगरपालिका और पंचायत) पूर्णतः गैर-दलीय होने चाहिए, मतपत्र पर पार्टी संबद्धता की अनुमति नहीं?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should local body elections (municipal and panchayat) be fully non-partisan, with no party affiliation allowed on the ballot?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — local issues, individual candidates only

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — स्थानीय मुद्दे, केवल व्यक्तिगत उम्मीदवार

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should local body elections (municipal and panchayat) be fully non-partisan, with no party affiliation allowed on the ballot?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes for panchayat, but not for municipal corporations

column.name: label_hi
column.value: पंचायत के लिए हां, लेकिन नगर निगम के लिए नहीं

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should local body elections (municipal and panchayat) be fully non-partisan, with no party affiliation allowed on the ballot?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — party backing ensures accountability

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — पार्टी समर्थन जवाबदेही सुनिश्चित करता है

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should local body elections (municipal and panchayat) be fully non-partisan, with no party affiliation allowed on the ballot?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should MPs be allowed to vote independently on health and environment bills without facing anti-defection penalties?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या सांसदों को स्वास्थ्य और पर्यावरण विधेयकों पर स्वतंत्र रूप से मतदान करने की अनुमति होनी चाहिए, दलीय विरोध कानून के दंड के बिना?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should MPs be allowed to vote independently on health and environment bills without facing anti-defection penalties?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — conscience votes on these issues

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — इन मुद्दों पर विवेक मत

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should MPs be allowed to vote independently on health and environment bills without facing anti-defection penalties?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, but only if constituency referendum supports it

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां, लेकिन केवल यदि निर्वाचन क्षेत्र जनमत समर्थन करे

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should MPs be allowed to vote independently on health and environment bills without facing anti-defection penalties?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — party discipline must be maintained

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — पार्टी अनुशासन बनाए रखना चाहिए

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should MPs be allowed to vote independently on health and environment bills without facing anti-defection penalties?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should High Court and Supreme Court judges be appointed through a transparent commission with opposition and civil society members, replacing the collegium?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या उच्च न्यायालय और सर्वोच्च न्यायालय के न्यायाधीशों की नियुक्ति विपक्ष और नागरिक समाज सदस्यों वाले पारदर्शी आयोग से होनी चाहिए, कोलेजियम की जगह?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should High Court and Supreme Court judges be appointed through a transparent commission with opposition and civil society members, replacing the collegium?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — broader transparent commission

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — व्यापक पारदर्शी आयोग

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should High Court and Supreme Court judges be appointed through a transparent commission with opposition and civil society members, replacing the collegium?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Reform collegium, but keep judges in control

column.name: label_hi
column.value: कोलेजियम में सुधार, लेकिन न्यायाधीशों का नियंत्रण बना रहे

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should High Court and Supreme Court judges be appointed through a transparent commission with opposition and civil society members, replacing the collegium?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — current collegium system works

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — वर्तमान कोलेजियम प्रणाली काम करती है

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should High Court and Supreme Court judges be appointed through a transparent commission with opposition and civil society members, replacing the collegium?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should districts where cases are pending for over 5 years automatically trigger a judicial capacity review and fast-track funding?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या उन जिलों में जहां 5 साल से अधिक मामले लंबित हैं, स्वचालित रूप से न्यायिक क्षमता समीक्षा और त्वरित धन आवंटन होना चाहिए?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should districts where cases are pending for over 5 years automatically trigger a judicial capacity review and fast-track funding?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — automatic review and funding

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — स्वचालित समीक्षा और धन

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should districts where cases are pending for over 5 years automatically trigger a judicial capacity review and fast-track funding?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, but only for criminal cases

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां, लेकिन केवल आपराधिक मामलों के लिए

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should districts where cases are pending for over 5 years automatically trigger a judicial capacity review and fast-track funding?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — state governments should decide

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — राज्य सरकारों को निर्णय लेना चाहिए

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should districts where cases are pending for over 5 years automatically trigger a judicial capacity review and fast-track funding?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should live-streaming of Supreme Court constitution bench hearings be mandatory for all cases affecting fundamental rights?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या मौलिक अधिकारों को प्रभावित करने वाले सभी मामलों में संविधान पीठ की सर्वोच्च न्यायालय सुनवाई की लाइव स्ट्रीमिंग अनिवार्य होनी चाहिए?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should live-streaming of Supreme Court constitution bench hearings be mandatory for all cases affecting fundamental rights?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — full public access via live stream

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — लाइव स्ट्रीम के माध्यम से पूर्ण जनता की पहुंच

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should live-streaming of Supreme Court constitution bench hearings be mandatory for all cases affecting fundamental rights?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, but with a delay for sensitive cases

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां, लेकिन संवेदनशील मामलों के लिए विलंब के साथ

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should live-streaming of Supreme Court constitution bench hearings be mandatory for all cases affecting fundamental rights?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — written judgments are sufficient

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — लिखित निर्णय पर्याप्त हैं

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should live-streaming of Supreme Court constitution bench hearings be mandatory for all cases affecting fundamental rights?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should election result disputes be resolved within 6 months through dedicated fast-track courts, with equal rules for all candidates?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या चुनाव परिणाम विवादों को समर्पित त्वरित न्यायालयों में 6 महीने के भीतर हल किया जाना चाहिए, सभी उम्मीदवारों के लिए समान नियमों के साथ?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should election result disputes be resolved within 6 months through dedicated fast-track courts, with equal rules for all candidates?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — mandatory 6-month deadline

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — अनिवार्य 6 महीने की समय सीमा

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should election result disputes be resolved within 6 months through dedicated fast-track courts, with equal rules for all candidates?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, but 12 months is more realistic

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां, लेकिन 12 महीने अधिक व्यावहारिक हैं

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should election result disputes be resolved within 6 months through dedicated fast-track courts, with equal rules for all candidates?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — current tribunal system is adequate

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — वर्तमान अधिकरण प्रणाली पर्याप्त है

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should election result disputes be resolved within 6 months through dedicated fast-track courts, with equal rules for all candidates?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should access to a primary health centre within 5 km be a legally enforceable citizen right, with state penalties for failure?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या 5 किमी के भीतर प्राथमिक स्वास्थ्य केंद्र तक पहुंच एक कानूनी रूप से लागू नागरिक अधिकार होना चाहिए, विफलता पर राज्य दंड के साथ?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should access to a primary health centre within 5 km be a legally enforceable citizen right, with state penalties for failure?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — legal right with penalties

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — दंड के साथ कानूनी अधिकार

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should access to a primary health centre within 5 km be a legally enforceable citizen right, with state penalties for failure?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, but as a policy goal — not a legal right

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां, लेकिन नीति लक्ष्य के रूप में — कानूनी अधिकार नहीं

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should access to a primary health centre within 5 km be a legally enforceable citizen right, with state penalties for failure?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — states should decide infrastructure priorities

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — राज्यों को बुनियादी ढांचे की प्राथमिकताएं तय करनी चाहिए

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should access to a primary health centre within 5 km be a legally enforceable citizen right, with state penalties for failure?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should all government hospitals be required to publish real-time bed availability and emergency wait times online?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या सभी सरकारी अस्पतालों को वास्तविक समय में बिस्तर उपलब्धता और आपातकालीन प्रतीक्षा समय ऑनलाइन प्रकाशित करना अनिवार्य होना चाहिए?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should all government hospitals be required to publish real-time bed availability and emergency wait times online?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — mandatory real-time transparency

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — अनिवार्य वास्तविक समय पारदर्शिता

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should all government hospitals be required to publish real-time bed availability and emergency wait times online?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, but daily updates are enough

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां, लेकिन दैनिक अपडेट पर्याप्त हैं

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should all government hospitals be required to publish real-time bed availability and emergency wait times online?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — hospitals cannot maintain such systems

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — अस्पताल ऐसी प्रणालियां बनाए नहीं रख सकते

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should all government hospitals be required to publish real-time bed availability and emergency wait times online?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should Ayushman Bharat be expanded to cover outpatient care and diagnostic tests, not just hospitalization?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या आयुष्मान भारत को बाह्य रोगी देखभाल और नैदानिक परीक्षणों को कवर करने के लिए विस्तारित किया जाना चाहिए, केवल अस्पताल में भर्ती नहीं?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should Ayushman Bharat be expanded to cover outpatient care and diagnostic tests, not just hospitalization?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — full primary-to-hospital coverage

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — प्राथमिक से अस्पताल तक पूर्ण कवरेज

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should Ayushman Bharat be expanded to cover outpatient care and diagnostic tests, not just hospitalization?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, but only diagnostics — not routine OPD

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां, लेकिन केवल नैदानिक — नियमित OPD नहीं

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should Ayushman Bharat be expanded to cover outpatient care and diagnostic tests, not just hospitalization?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — current hospitalization focus is correct

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — वर्तमान अस्पतालीकरण फोकस सही है

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should Ayushman Bharat be expanded to cover outpatient care and diagnostic tests, not just hospitalization?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should new industrial projects post an environmental compliance bond, refundable only after 10 years of verified standards?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या नई औद्योगिक परियोजनाओं को पर्यावरण अनुपालन बॉन्ड जमा करना चाहिए, जो केवल 10 साल सत्यापित मानकों के बाद वापस मिले?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should new industrial projects post an environmental compliance bond, refundable only after 10 years of verified standards?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — bond ensures long-term compliance

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — बॉन्ड दीर्घकालिक अनुपालन सुनिश्चित करता है

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should new industrial projects post an environmental compliance bond, refundable only after 10 years of verified standards?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, but 5 years is enough

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां, लेकिन 5 साल पर्याप्त हैं

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should new industrial projects post an environmental compliance bond, refundable only after 10 years of verified standards?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — it will discourage investment

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — यह निवेश को हतोत्साहित करेगा

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should new industrial projects post an environmental compliance bond, refundable only after 10 years of verified standards?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should crop residue burning penalties apply only in districts where the state provides subsidized stubble-management machines within 50 km?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या फसल अवशेष जलाने के दंड केवल उन जिलों में लागू होने चाहिए जहां राज्य 50 किमी के भीतर सब्सिडी वाली पराली प्रबंधन मशीनें उपलब्ध कराता है?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should crop residue burning penalties apply only in districts where the state provides subsidized stubble-management machines within 50 km?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — penalty only where alternatives exist

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — दंड केवल जहां विकल्प उपलब्ध हों

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should crop residue burning penalties apply only in districts where the state provides subsidized stubble-management machines within 50 km?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — ban burning everywhere immediately

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — हर जगह तुरंत जलाने पर प्रतिबंध

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should crop residue burning penalties apply only in districts where the state provides subsidized stubble-management machines within 50 km?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Gradual rollout — penalties after 3-year subsidy phase

column.name: label_hi
column.value: क्रमिक लागू — 3 साल की सब्सिडी अवधि के बाद दंड

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should crop residue burning penalties apply only in districts where the state provides subsidized stubble-management machines within 50 km?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should an Air Quality Index above 400 automatically suspend non-essential diesel vehicles and construction in that city until AQI drops below 200?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या 400 से अधिक वायु गुणवत्ता सूचकांक पर स्वचालित रूप से गैर-आवश्यक डीजल वाहनों और निर्माण को उस शहर में निलंबित किया जाना चाहिए, जब तक AQI 200 से नीचे न आ जाए?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should an Air Quality Index above 400 automatically suspend non-essential diesel vehicles and construction in that city until AQI drops below 200?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — automatic trigger-based restrictions

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — स्वचालित ट्रिगर-आधारित प्रतिबंध

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should an Air Quality Index above 400 automatically suspend non-essential diesel vehicles and construction in that city until AQI drops below 200?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, but state government should confirm first

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां, लेकिन राज्य सरकार को पहले पुष्टि करनी चाहिए

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should an Air Quality Index above 400 automatically suspend non-essential diesel vehicles and construction in that city until AQI drops below 200?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — too disruptive to daily life and economy

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — दैनिक जीवन और अर्थव्यवस्था के लिए बहुत व्यवधानकारी

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should an Air Quality Index above 400 automatically suspend non-essential diesel vehicles and construction in that city until AQI drops below 200?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should inter-state river water disputes be resolved by an independent environmental tribunal rather than tribunals appointed by the Centre?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या अंतर-राज्यीय नदी जल विवादों का समाधान केंद्र द्वारा नियुक्त अधिकरणों के बजाय स्वतंत्र पर्यावरण अधिकरण द्वारा होना चाहिए?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should inter-state river water disputes be resolved by an independent environmental tribunal rather than tribunals appointed by the Centre?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — independent environmental tribunal

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — स्वतंत्र पर्यावरण अधिकरण

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should inter-state river water disputes be resolved by an independent environmental tribunal rather than tribunals appointed by the Centre?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, with all riparian states represented equally

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां, सभी तटवर्ती राज्यों की समान प्रतिनिधित्व के साथ

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should inter-state river water disputes be resolved by an independent environmental tribunal rather than tribunals appointed by the Centre?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — Centre must arbitrate inter-state disputes

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — केंद्र को अंतर-राज्यीय विवादों का मध्यस्थता करना चाहिए

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should inter-state river water disputes be resolved by an independent environmental tribunal rather than tribunals appointed by the Centre?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित

column.name: question_en
column.value: Should state-level carbon emission targets be legally binding, with central fund cuts for states that miss targets for three consecutive years?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या राज्य-स्तरीय कार्बन उत्सर्जन लक्ष्य कानूनी रूप से बाध्यकारी होने चाहिए, लगातार तीन साल लक्ष्य चूकने वाले राज्यों के लिए केंद्रीय धन में कटौती के साथ?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should state-level carbon emission targets be legally binding, with central fund cuts for states that miss targets for three consecutive years?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes — binding targets with fiscal consequences

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां — वित्तीय परिणामों के साथ बाध्यकारी लक्ष्य

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should state-level carbon emission targets be legally binding, with central fund cuts for states that miss targets for three consecutive years?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, but incentives — not fund cuts

column.name: label_hi
column.value: हां, लेकिन प्रोत्साहन — धन कटौती नहीं

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should state-level carbon emission targets be legally binding, with central fund cuts for states that miss targets for three consecutive years?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: No — states need flexibility on development

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नहीं — राज्यों को विकास पर लचीलापन चाहिए

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Should state-level carbon emission targets be legally binding, with central fund cuts for states that miss targets for three consecutive years?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: अनिश्चित
